blended.narrative: Sun Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,759 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: light rain showers, highs of 48°F.
Saturday: light rain showers, highs of 44°F.
